title: Mud to Clay Smelting Recipe
description: This data pack adds a smelting recipe for furnaces to turn mud into clay.
body:
**This data pack adds a smelting recipe to turn mud into clay in furnaces.**

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db75d40863383d81ff5c3d8c38fad21269070066.png)

# 🔩 Supports:
- 1.21.9+
- Vanilla and modded Minecraft.

# 🎈 More Info:

<details>
<summary>🧰 Updates</summary>
The pack will be updated a few days after a new Minecraft version comes out.
</details>

<details>
<summary>🎨 Altering, Customizing, and Uploading the Data Pack</summary>
You can change assets inside the pack, but you cannot upload it anywhere (Modrinth, Curseforge, Social Media, etc.). Use it for yourself and the people you know. If you want to create addons/extensions for my data packs, please delete all the assets I made, then upload your own anywhere you'd like.
</details>
